asset.title: Private Investment Room V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: A polished, narrated explainer video demonstrating AI agent collaboration in a financial spreadsheet room with robust versioning and proposal controls.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows spreadsheet collaboration and agent proposals clearly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates proposal, approval, and versioning sequence.

visualDesign.evidence: Polished dark UI with smooth zoom transitions.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's multi-agent workspace narrative.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Realistic UI interactions and state changes shown.

legibility.evidence: Small spreadsheet text is hard to read without zoom.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly applicable to financial auditing and AI collaboration.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly denotes agent actions as reviewable proposals.

observedEvidence: Interactive spreadsheet with Q2/Q3 financial data
Agent 'Maya' proposing changes to the variance column
Version history panel showing edits by different users/agents
missingEvidence: Direct API execution trace or raw logs showing the agent's reasoning process in real-time.

defects.observed: Spreadsheet cell values and small labels are difficult to read before the zoom-in occurs.
defects.fix: Increase the default font size or apply a stronger zoom on the active spreadsheet area during narration.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: NodeRoom's Private Investment Room demonstrates how human teams and AI agents collaborate on financial spreadsheets with full version control and proposal-based approvals.
